nodes.label: Token Security Properties (CSPRNG, SHA-256 hash, never persisted plaintext)
Rationale: workspaceId mandatory first arg prevents cross-tenant data leaks
Rationale: Cross-workspace domain lookup returns 404 not 403 (no existence leak)
Rationale: Audit writes are best-effort — failure never fails user-facing request
Rationale: Opaque Refresh Tokens (SHA-256 hash, never persisted plaintext)
Rationale: passwordChangedAt — kills all access tokens globally without Redis enumeration
Rationale: 30s grace window prevents false TOKEN_REUSE on flaky networks / concurrent tabs
Rationale: Pub/Sub Cache Invalidation for RBAC Replicas
Rationale: Single Source of Truth for Config via Zod Validation
Rationale: Billing Env Vars Optional So App Boots Without Stripe
Monthly Email Quota Gate (per workspace plan)
Rationale: Idempotency Key Prevents Duplicate Sends on Retry
Rationale: Optimistic Concurrency (version field) Prevents Lost Updates
Webhook Dedup (Redis NX + DB UNIQUE on stripe_event_id)
Rationale: Two-Tier Webhook Dedup Guards Against Stripe Retries
Checkout Redis NX Lock (prevents concurrent sessions)
Rationale: Async Segment Computation via Go Worker for Scalability

hyperedges.label: Access Token Revocation System (JTI denylist + passwordChangedAt + family revocation)
RBAC Enforcement Chain (Workspace Guard + Redis Cache + Permissions)
Go Worker NATS Compute Pipeline (Segments + Workflows + Campaigns)
Email Delivery Pipeline (Transactional Send + Domain Verification + Quota Gate)
Domain SES Verification Flow (create → NATS poll → SES → verified event)
